NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IDM GLASS COMPANY HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL HEATH FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN BUILDERS & DEVELOPERS, INC

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF IDM GLASS COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. THERE IS NO MERIT IN DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE AS THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT THERE ARE NO ACTIONS THAT CAN BE TAKEN TO OBTAIN ACCESS TO DEFENDANT'S PROPERTY. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT HAS TAKEN REASONABLE STEPS TO GET ACCESS TO THE DOCUMENTS BEING SOUGHT BY THIS MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $940, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Assigned To Arbitration On Jan-05-09

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff IDM Glass Company's Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is granted. There is no merit in Defendant's response as there is no showing that there are no actions that can be taken to obtain access to Defendant's property. There is no evidence that Defendant has taken reasonable steps to get access to the documents being sought by this motion. The court finds that the responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $940, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)
